title: Classic musical discs
description: Mod Classic musical discs - adds new musical discs with classic music to minecraft! This mod is perfect for playing with friends or on servers.
body:
## 📜 Short description
 **Mod Classical musical discs - adds new musical discs with classic music to minecraft! This mod is perfect for playing with friends or on servers.**

 

 
## ➕ What does the mod add?  
- **Section in Creative (so you can take musical discs from creative);**
- **Music discs with the Toccata et Fugue [BWV565] (Bach), A little night serenade (Mozart), Piano Sonata №11 (Mozart), Symphony №40 (Mozart), Requiem №8 [Lacrimosa] (Mozart), Symphony №5 (Beethoven), Piano Sonata №14 [Moonlight] (Beethoven), For Eliza (Beethoven), Arrival of the queen of Sheba (Handel), Spring part №1 [Allegro] (Vivaldi), Summer part №3 [Presto] (Vivaldi), The Triumph of Time and Disillusion (Handel), Wedding march (Mendelssohn), Ride of the Valkyries (Wagner), Toreador march (Bizet), Water music (Handel), Morning (Grieg), Dance of the fairy dragee (Thcaikovsky), Sarabande suite №11 (Handel), Nocturne Op №9 №1 (Chopin), Hungarian Rhapsody №2 (Liszt), Hungarian Dance №5 (Brahms), Snowstorm II Waltz (Sviridov), Waltz №2 (Shostakovitch), Dance Of The Knights (Prokofiev);**
- **Mechanics, getting musical discs, just like in vanilla;**
- **Music discs can be found in simple dungeon (where the mob spawner with chests is located);**
- **Achievement for getting any classic musical disc;**
- **Achievement for obtaining all classic musical discs;**
- **Function 'give_all_music_disc' to give all music disc with classic music.**

 
## 📝 Contact details

- **My discord: Donne431#6562 / donne431**
- **Discord server: https://discord.gg/NQBhQRDEhF**
- **Donate ☕ - https://www.donationalerts.com/r/donne431**

 

 
## ⁉️ FAG

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


 

**Q: Can I use this mod in my modpack?**

**A: Of course you can!**

 

**Q: Can I help translate?**

**A: Sure, just write me in Discord.**

 

**Q: How can I support you?**

**A: You can simply write a comment, join the discord server, or DONATE to me (link to discord and donations above, in the Contact Details section)**

 

</details>


 
## ‼️ Warning
1. **Please, if you have published this mod on another site, provide a link to *CurseForge* or *Modrinth*, thanks in advance.**
